text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: One day, I'm working at my desk,<n>when...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
U-um! P-p-please help! It's Opera O...<n>There's
something terribly wrong<n>with her!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Urgh... I don't think I've ever seenher not smiling! Whatever's goingon, it can't be good!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
She has a point. Even from a<n>distance, it's clear
that T.M. Opera O<n>is far from her usual self.
choice_data_list: It can't be... Could she be depressed?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Neath the stillness of a wintry sky do<n>I espy Stars
gleaming o'er the gallant<n>Overlord
choice_data_list: (Is she reciting some kind of poem?)

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what is she saying? Now I'm<n>even more
confused...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Alas! It's no good... I wish to exude<n>composure,
yet my beauteous<n>form—draped in
ultramarine—brings<n>me naught but joy!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
So... She left to go change, but she<n>looks just as
troubled as before!<n>Ohhh, what is going on, Opera
O?!
choice_data_list:
Do you suppose her mood has something to do
with that outfit?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! No way!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Oh, it's you, Doto. I thought I<n>heard your
voice. And you've my<n>courtly trainer with you!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eeek! I'm s-s-so sorry! I didn't mean<n>to snoop!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! What is there to apologize<n>for? It's only
natural you'd be drawn<n>to this new allure of mine!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Why, I speak of this heretofore<n>unseen side of
myself, brought out by<n>my heretofore unseen
outfit!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I am radiant as the sun, 'tis true. But<n>am I not also
beautiful, thus,<n>overflowing with serene and
gallant<n>grace?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Indeed! You gaze upon the deep<n>aquamarine of a
breaking dawn as it<n>graces the New Year's sky!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
The winter sky of New Year's day?<n>Th-that's so
deep! That's Opera O for<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I ask her if she's trying to search for<n>a new side
of herself that will suit her<n>new outfit, and she
nods.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Quick on the uptake as ever! Indeed, I<n>was
seeking precisely that...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And in the midst of my search, who<n>should appear
but you, Doto! This is<n>no mere happenstance, I'm
quite<n>certain!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
You are always enveloped in a blue<n>aura... and I
do believe I shall take this<n>opportunity to learn
from your brave<n>and melancholic bearing!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! M-me?! I-I'm not really sure<n>what I can do,
but I'm happy to be of<n>service!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I assume you too are willing to lend<n>your aid. Well,
Trainer? Where should<n>I begin?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Impersonation? I see! I can embody<n>her spirit by
first imitating her<n>movements! With my talents as
a<n>thespian, this will take no time at all!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: ...! Well? What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: O-o-oh my! Umm, well...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I believe your melancholic expression<n>looks
something like... this! Ngh! I<n>need to make it more
heartbreaking,<n>more beautiful...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: More... More blue!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Through some trial and error, T.M.<n>Opera O seems
to have learned<n>something from how Meisho Doto
carries herself.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hm... In that case, I'd like to see<n>Doto—brimming
with gallantry and<n>gloom—in a more natural state.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
A more natural state... So I just need<n>to act
normal? O-o-okay, I can do that!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Just so! I appreciate your<n>cooperation. Worry not
about my<n>presence—I shall observe you from<n>the
shadows like a phantom anon!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The next day, I find T.M. Opera O<n>watching Meisho
Doto in affected<n>secrecy.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ah... I am the phantom of the Overlord!<n>Here I
stand, an angel of the<n>shadows, to clandestinely
gaze upon<n>thee!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Whaaaaagh! Again?! I-it's<n>nerve-racking being
watched like this!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Eurgh!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Doto! Are you all right?! Phew, it<n>appears you're
uninjured.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
But how awe-inspiring... The way in<n>which you fell
and cried out... That<n>was truly magnificent! You've
taught<n>me much!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: U-uh... This is more than I can take!<n>Aaah!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, a futile endeavor! One cannot<n>outrun a
specter!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, Meisho Doto finds herself<n>haunted for
several days...
